caption:
Introducing the Stria Terra Fluted Curved Sideboard — where sculpture meets storage.

Crafted from solid wood, this piece stands out with its beautiful curved silhouette and vertical fluted detailing that adds depth, texture, and a sense of movement. It’s not just furniture — it’s a visual statement.

The seamless, handle-free design keeps the look clean and modern, while inside, it offers spacious shelving behind four concealed doors for everyday storage.

Whether placed in a living room, hallway, dining space, or bedroom, this sideboard instantly elevates the space with warmth and sophistication.

Designed for homes that appreciate:
• Clean modern aesthetics
• Solid wood craftsmanship
• Functional luxury

A bold piece. A timeless presence.

Hashtags

#SideboardDesign #FlutedFurniture #WoodenSideboard #ModernFurnitureIndia #SolidWoodFurniture LuxuryFurnitureIndia InteriorDesignIndia LivingRoomDecor HallwayFurniture StatementFurniture SoniArt JodhpurFurniture HandcraftedFurniture

Bring home a piece of art you can sit on ✨

Presenting the Duri Heart Oriental Wooden Bench — handcrafted in Jodhpur with a beautiful blend of solid wood and handwoven kilim upholstery. Each piece carries its own unique pattern, inspired by traditional oriental designs, making every bench truly one of a kind.

The soft cushioned seat offers everyday comfort, while the vibrant fabric adds warmth and character to your space.

Perfect for:
• Entryways & hallways
• Bedroom corners
• Living room accents
• Dining seating

A bench that is not just functional — but full of story, culture, and craftsmanship.

#WoodenBench #KilimFurniture #HandcraftedFurniture #JodhpurFurniture #SolidWoodFurniture BohoDecorIndia EthnicFurniture HomeDecorIndia BenchDesign SoniArt MadeInIndia ArtisanFurniture

Create a dining space that feels warm, inviting, and timeless.

Presenting our Bella Round Dining Table paired with Izvara Upholstered Dining Chairs — a perfect blend of classic charm and everyday comfort.

Finished in a beautiful distressed white tone, the round table brings a soft, vintage character to your space, while the solid wood construction ensures strength and durability. The round form encourages closer conversations, making every meal more personal.

Paired with the Izvara chairs, featuring a comfortable upholstered seat and supportive back, this set is designed for long, relaxed dining experiences.

Perfect for:
• Family dining spaces
• Cozy breakfast corners
• Café-style interiors at home

A setup that is not just functional — but truly welcoming.

caption:
✨ Timeless Beauty in Every Detail ✨
This stunning Chest of Drawers Cabinet is handcrafted with exquisite Mother of Pearl inlay, giving it a luxurious and elegant look. The soft light brown tone adds warmth and sophistication, making it a perfect statement piece for any space.
Adorned with delicate leaf and floral patterns, every detail reflects fine craftsmanship and artistic beauty.
Perfect for styling in your hallway, living room, or bedroom, this chest not only enhances your décor but also offers practical storage with elegance.
A true blend of functionality, craftsmanship, and timeless design.
#MotherOfPearl #ChestOfDrawers #LuxuryFurniture #HandcraftedFurniture #HomeDecor StatementFurniture ArtisanCraft ElegantInteriors

Introducing the iconic Pierre Jeanneret Kangaroo Chair — a timeless blend of heritage design and modern comfort.

Crafted from solid teak wood, this chair features the signature low-slung silhouette and bold angular frame that defines Jeanneret’s legendary Chandigarh collection. The handwoven cane seat and backrest add an airy texture while ensuring breathable comfort for everyday use.

The gently reclined form, combined with a supportive footrest, creates a relaxed seating experience — perfect for unwinding in style.

With its warm wood tones and natural cane detailing, this chair effortlessly elevates:
• Living rooms
• Lounges
• Reading corners
• Premium interior spaces

A true statement piece that reflects craftsmanship, history, and refined taste.

Hashtags

#PierreJeanneret #KangarooChair #ChandigarhFurniture #TeakWoodFurniture #CaneFurniture LuxuryFurnitureIndia DesignerFurniture MidCenturyModern WoodenFurniture HandcraftedFurniture InteriorDesignIndia SoniArt JodhpurFurniture IconicDesign

Thrilled to share a glimpse of our recent project at Boilermaker Bar, Goa.
Our team crafted a complete range of solid wood furniture, including bar chairs, dining chairs, accent chairs, and custom tables—designed to elevate the ambience of this beautiful space.

Every piece is handcrafted with precision, smooth finishes, and rich detailing to match the bar’s vibrant Goan vibe. From the comfort of the seating to the timeless charm of solid wood, the entire setup brings warmth, style, and durability to one of Goa’s most inviting bar spaces.

Proud to have added our craftsmanship to a place that celebrates good food, great drinks, and memorable moments. 🍸✨

caption:
Soni Art — Transforming restaurants, cafés, and hotels into unforgettable style destinations. ✨
From the elegance of @orchidhotelpune and the coastal charm of @sopogoa, to the vibrant vibes of @cheelizzarajkot and the serene luxury of @belvederekasauli — our custom-made solid wood furniture turns every space into an experience.

We specialize in wooden restaurant tables, café chairs, hotel lobby furniture, bar counters, booth seating, outdoor dining furniture, bistro sets, and luxury resort furniture — all designed for durability, comfort, and style. Every piece is handcrafted from premium kiln-dried solid wood and can be customized in size, shape, design, and color to match your theme.

Whether you’re opening a new restaurant, upgrading a café interior, furnishing a boutique hotel, or creating an outdoor seating area, Soni Art delivers bespoke furniture solutions that make guests stay longer and come back for more.

💡 Why choose Soni Art?
✔ 100% Solid Wood Craftsmanship

Introducing the Canelux Dining Set by Soni Art – Where Elegance Meets Functionality.**
Crafted for those who appreciate thoughtful design and timeless aesthetics, this 4-seater dining set is the perfect addition to your space — whether it's a stylish café, a boutique hotel, a modern restaurant, or your own home.

The centerpiece is a stunning **white marble top dining table**, resting gracefully on **two strong cast iron bases** that provide industrial strength with a designer look. Paired with **four beautifully handwoven cane rattan chairs**, each featuring **double-sided cane work** and a **light green padded seat**, this set offers unmatched comfort and charm.

The **sandblasted solid wood frame** of the chairs adds texture and warmth, making this piece not just furniture, but a statement of style. Whether you're hosting guests or designing a professional space, the Canelux set brings luxury, durability, and Indian craftsmanship together.

🪑 Handcrafted in Jodhpur
🛒 Available now at [soniart.in](https://soniart.in)
📦 Bulk orders and custom options available

caption:
Introducing our **Solid Sheesham Wood Armrest Chair** — designed for comfort, built for long-lasting performance.

Crafted for a restaurant project in **Jodhpur**, this chair combines **strong solid wood construction** with thoughtful ergonomic design. The **angled backrest** provides natural support, making it comfortable even during extended seating hours.

The chair features a **thick cushioned seat and back**, upholstered in a **soft light green leatherette**, adding both comfort and a refreshing visual appeal to the space. The subtle color tone blends beautifully with modern interiors while maintaining a warm, inviting feel.

With sturdy armrests and a well-balanced structure, this chair is ideal for:
• Restaurants & cafés
• Dining spaces
• Hospitality projects
• Premium home dining setups

Built from **solid sheesham wood**, it ensures durability, strength, and timeless character — perfect for high-usage environments.

Comfort meets craftsmanship. Designed for real use.

Made from high-quality solid wood, this wall shelf set is designed to enhance your walls while providing practical storage and display space. The natural wood finish adds warmth and character, making it suitable for a wide range of interior styles from modern to contemporary.

This set of three shelves offers versatile styling options. You can arrange them in multiple layouts to suit your space — whether in the living room, bedroom, hallway, or workspace.
